title: Guest appearance on No-Code Balkan podcast: How I made Bubble.io agency from 0
subheading: From sales and market development to launching my first startup and building apps for clients - I shared my full no-code journey with the No-Code Balkan community.
excerpt: Marko Milojković joins the No-Code Balkan podcast to share how he built his Bubble.io agency from scratch — lessons on sales, startups, mindset, and no-code growth.
seoDescription: Marko Milojković joins the No-Code Balkan podcast to share how he built his Bubble.io agency from scratch — lessons on sales, startups, mindset, and no-code growth.
coverAlt: Marko Milojković speaking on No-Code Balkan podcast about his journey from sales to launching a Bubble no-code agency
bodyHtml:
Last week, I had the pleasure of being a guest on the No-Code Balkan podcast - one of the most inspiring no-code communities in my region.

For just over an hour, we discussed how I transitioned from a sales background into tech - without any coding experience - and how I eventually built my own startup, and then Eterna, our no-code agency where we help founders launch beautiful, functional apps in record time.

We talked about:

  • How I validated and built my first startup (Razmeni) from scratch
  • Why Bubble became my go-to no-code platform
  • What it really takes to go from freelancer to agency
  • The mindset needed to succeed in no-code
  • My tips on client acquisition, UI/UX, and staying consistent
  • The future of programming and how no-code changes the game

Whether you’re just starting out, freelancing, or building your own app - there’s something in this episode for you.

Watch the full episode here:

﻿

Big thanks to the No-Code Balkan crew - Vlada and Nemanja for the invite, and huge shoutout for leading the way in our region with transparent, value-packed conversations about no-code, AI, freelancing, and mindset.

This kind of open conversation is exactly what makes the no-code space so powerful and future-proof. Balkan has a lot of talent and we plan to grow local to international, so community work that No-Code Balkan crew are doing is just awesome.

Let’s keep building, sharing, and helping each other grow. Thank you all for listening, hope you will enjoy the podcast.
